3 add 4

topics.desc: Inline the function body at call site
Optimize tail-recursive function into a loop
topics.code:
tailrec fun factorial(n: Int, acc: Int = 1): Int =
  if (n == 1) acc else factorial(n - 1, n * acc)

topics.desc: Anonymous function stored in a variable
Implicit name for single lambda parameter
Separate parameters from lambda body

open class Animal(val name: String)
class Dog(name: String) : Animal(name)

topics.desc: Visible everywhere — default modifier

Visible within the same module only

first throws if not found; find returns null

Run a block, refer to object as 'it'. Good for null-safe calls and transforms
Configure an object and return the same object. Great for builders

Optimized for network calls and disk reads/writes
For CPU-heavy work like sorting or parsing large data
Cold stream — only runs when collected
Terminal operator that starts collecting emitted values
Hot stream that always holds the latest value — great for UI state

Generic type parameter
Upper bound — T must be a subtype of Type
topics.code:
fun <T : Comparable<T>> max(a: T, b: T) =
  if (a > b) a else b

topics.desc: Type can only produce T — safe to read, not write

topics.desc: Pattern match on type — each branch is smart-cast

topics.desc: Always start with val; only change to var if mutation is needed

val name = "Kotlin" // preferred
